name: bubu-toolkit
description: BUBU Global's all-in-one Cowork toolkit. Skills: MarkItDown (convert any uploaded file to Markdown), BUBU MOM (on-brand Minutes of Meeting in .docx + .pdf), BUBU Admin Docs (branded invoices, letters, SOPs), BUBU Presentation (on-brand decks via Canva MCP), BUBU Market Research (research planning & synthesis), and BUBU StopSlop (the house editorial voice: no AI-sounding prose in any output).
